headline: Dell, Cisco: How 'throwback' tech stocks fit into the AI trade
summary: B. Riley Wealth chief market strategist Art Hogan and Yahoo Finance Senior Business Reporter Ines Ferré chat with Yahoo Finance Executive Editor Brian Sozzi about where "throwback" tech stocks, like Dell (DELL) and Cisco (CSCO), fit into the artificial intelligence (AI) trade.

headline: This Tech Stock Joins Intel, Cisco Smashing Dot-Com Records
summary: After  Intel Cisco  and  Corning  earlier this year, data storage company  NetApp  is the latest tech stalwart set to finally surpass its 2000 record high.  “Throughout our history, NetApp has ridden wave after wave of change in the IT ocean,” the company’s history page reads.  True to its word, NetApp is now riding the AI wave.
